title: Floral British Oats Curry
description: A fragrant, plantbased curry that blends the comforting texture of oats with aromatic bay leaf and a splash of coconut milk, perfect for a rainy British monsoon evening.

ingredients.name: rolled oats
ingredients.notes: gluten‑free, steel cut or rolled works well

instructions: Rinse the rolled oats under cold water and set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat; add the onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for another 1‑2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in the ground cumin and coriander, letting them toast lightly for 30 seconds.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add the bay leaf and the rinsed oats, then reduce heat to low and cover; let it simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oats absorb most of the liquid and reach a creamy consistency.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the coconut milk, lemon juice, salt, and pepper, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Let the curry rest for 5 minutes so the flavors meld together.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs or a squeeze of lime.
Enjoy the floral warmth of this British‑style oat curry!
